productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this leather boot from red tape. With a high ankle and natural finish, this boot is a great addition to your wardrobe.UpperFull-grain leather upper in natural colour for absolute comfort, durability and styleHigh ankle for enhanced style and better support to the lower legFabric inner lining with a padded collar for ultimate breathabilityLace-up system with metallic eyelets and metallic clips on the upper vamp for a snug, customised FitMidsoleFabric footbed for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a mechanical design on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the back heel for grip and traction in style Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to maintain shoe shineDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
